executives.name: Andrew Ross
executives.background: Mr. Ross has served as President and Chief Operating Officer since January 2023. He previously served as Vice President and President – Engineered Materials Group from 2015 to 2022.

executives.name: Merline Saintil
executives.background: Ms. Saintil has served as a member of the Board since 2021. She is an experienced technology executive and board member, having held leadership roles at Intuit, Yahoo!, and PayPal.

executives.name: Vikas Parekh
executives.background: Mr. Parekh has served as a member of our board of directors since December 2021. Mr. Parekh is a Managing Partner at SoftBank Investment Advisers.
